Class ProducerConfigProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.boot.pulsar.autoconfigure.PulsarProperties.Producer
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties.ProducerConfigProperties
Direct Known Subclasses:
PulsarProducerProperties
public class ProducerConfigProperties extends org.springframework.boot.pulsar.autoconfigure.PulsarProperties.Producer
Configuration properties used to specify Pulsar producers.
Author:
Chris Bono
